title: Elite Maya people had teeth placed in a cave far from their tombs
description: A cave in Belize contains teeth from dozens of important Maya people buried elsewhere, which may attest to a ritual intended to ensure their passage to the underworld
author: Chris Simms

title: X's secretive plans to deliver cargo to Earth from space
description: Not much is known about Starfall, SpaceX's new delivery system, but an assessment published in May revealed its intended purpose
author: Alex Wilkins

title: Unapproved gene therapy for boosting longevity is set to go on sale
description: A gene therapy that instructs cells to produce more of an anti-ageing protein called klotho is about to be offered by a US company at overseas clinics to bypass FDA rules
author: Alice Klein

title: Woman with Alzheimer's starts conversing again after taking psilocybin
description: A woman with severe Alzheimer's disease who hadn't spoken more than monosyllables in years began initiating conversation after a single dose of psilocybin
author: Mattha Busby

title: New-to-science spider builds trap that flings ants into the air
description: A spider living in the rainforests of Queensland, Australia, builds a snare trap reminiscent of a Roman-era ballista weapon that it uses to catapult green tree ants into a web 30 centimetres above
author: James Woodford

title: A promising natural technique to remove CO2 could backfire
description: Several start-ups have tried to grow seaweed to remove atmospheric CO2, but this could affect the levels of nutrients in the ocean and hamper other CO2-sucking processes
author: Alec Luhn
